title: Linked Lists, Nodes, and Pointer Invariants · Execution Trace: Linked Traversal
summary: Build a mutable work queue where stable node links matter more than random access. Planned artifact: Add and verify the dsa linked traversal increment in a linked structure with diagrammed invariants. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Implement traversal with termination evidence and malformed-cycle protection.
Insert and delete at boundaries while preserving connectivity and size invariants.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
